venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room with open-seating service for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Contemporary international cuisine with rotating menus. Complimentary wines and caviar available at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant on Deck 7. Daytime buffet with indoor and alfresco terrace seating; evening slow-food Italian à la carte using sustainable ingredients — fresh handmade pasta, locally sourced cheeses and charcuterie. Reservations recommended for dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Casual daytime alfresco dining: salads, grilled fish, and light bites. Evening Black Rock / Hot Rocks interactive dining — guests cook prime meats and seafood on preheated volcanic lava stones at the table. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: Signature French fine-dining restaurant in partnership with Relais & Châteaux (formerly Le Champagne, rebranded fleet-wide circa 2017–2020). Six-course wine-pairing menu with luxury ingredients: lobster, foie gras, caviar. Intimate setting. Dinner only; supplement $60 per person.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour butler-delivered in-suite dining with full white-tablecloth service. Full dinner menu, breakfast, and light meal options delivered to every suite.
